title: Add proof-of-API integration test for ferrolearn-cluster
description:
Final step of #244. tests/api_proof.rs exercising every public API:
- KMeans / MiniBatchKMeans / BisectingKMeans: fit, predict, transform, fit_predict, centroids accessor
- DBSCAN / OPTICS / AgglomerativeClustering / HDBSCAN / Birch / AffinityPropagation / SpectralClustering: fit, fit_predict, labels accessor (no predict)
- MeanShift: fit, predict, fit_predict, cluster_centers accessor
- GMM / BayesianGMM: fit, predict, predict_proba, transform, score, score_samples, bic, aic
- LabelPropagation / LabelSpreading: fit, predict, predict_proba, score
- FeatureAgglomeration: fit, transform
- All public enum variants (Linkage, CovarianceType, BayesianCovType, WeightPriorType, BisectingStrategy, MiniBatchKMeansInit, AgglomerativeLinkage, PoolingFunc, LabelPropagationKernel, LabelSpreadingKernel)
